title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 180.100 - Commissioner of administration to certify accounts
text:
180.100.  Commissioner of administration to certify accounts. — The commissioner of administration shall certify the accounts of the librarian and assistant librarian and warrants shall be drawn on the treasury for the payment of the same.
(RSMo 1939 § 14720, A.L. 1945 p. 1129 § 14719) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13420; 1919 § 7163; 1909 § 8159
